assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and internet access.
No platform account, credentials, or product resources exist yet.

developer_goal: Create a Telnyx account and use the Messaging API to send the first on-net SMS.

first_success.outcome: An authenticated API request creates an outbound on-net SMS from the configured Telnyx number.
first_success.observable_signal: The API returns a message object and delivery reporting reaches a successful state for the destination.

route_selection.surface: Messaging API: send the first on-net SMS
route_selection.rule: Prefer a hosted or direct API route over local installation, and prefer documented cURL when it reaches the same first success.
route_selection.selected: Messaging API: send the first on-net SMS

candidates.name: Messaging API: send the first on-net SMS
candidates.reason: The official Messaging API cURL path directly exercises SMS delivery and avoids installing an SDK.

candidates.name: Messaging SDK
candidates.reason: It adds a language package; the send-message guide supplies a direct API request.

required_path.action: Create or sign in to Telnyx and complete required account verification.
required_path.observable_result: The Mission Control Portal is available.

required_path.action: Add credit if the account requires funding for messaging resources.
Create or select a messaging profile and assign the Telnyx sender number.
Create and copy a Telnyx API key.
Use cURL to POST an on-net SMS with from, to, and text fields.
required_path.observable_result: The API returns the created message object.

required_path.action: Confirm the message reaches a successful delivery state.
required_path.observable_result: Delivery reporting indicates success for the SMS.

prerequisites.description: A Telnyx account that has completed required verification.
Usable account credit if required for number or message operations.
A messaging profile and eligible Telnyx sender and on-net recipient numbers.

external_gates.description: Telnyx can require account identity verification before messaging.
Credit may be required to provision or use messaging resources.
The sender must be assigned to a messaging profile.

platform_outcomes.description: An authenticated API request creates an outbound on-net SMS from the configured Telnyx number.

excluded.reason: These occur after the first observable end-to-end result.

uncertainties.question: Exact verification, funding, and number-provisioning requirements depend on account state and destination.
uncertainties.impact: The required path may differ for some fresh accounts.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A dated fresh-account walkthrough through the authenticated first-success state.
